title: Validation: live operations priority sequence should chain review and Track under stacked replay pressure
description: Validation replay for a live operations priority sequence that falls back from dispatch into Track while conflicting specialist pressure stays attached to the same decision point.
author: zaks

specialistAssessments.summary: CCTV specialist wants the fallback desk held in CCTV Review until visual verification is complete.
evidence: Review evidence is already staged for the live watch incident.
Dispatch availability already failed at the handoff gate.

specialistAssessments.summary: Track specialist still wants Tactical Track open immediately for continuity pressure.
evidence: Track continuity can absorb the next move without waiting for dispatch.
missingInfo: Fresh CCTV confirmation has not landed yet.

commandBrainSnapshot.headline: Tactical Track is the next move
commandBrainSnapshot.summary: One next move is staged in Tactical Track.
commandBrainSnapshot.advisory: Dispatch was unavailable, and specialists still disagreed on the fallback desk (cctv->cctvReview | track->tacticalTrack), so ONYX kept the live-ops sequence moving in Tactical Track while the conflict stayed visible.
commandBrainSnapshot.rationale: Scenario replay preserved the live-ops sequence contract, applied the Track fallback when dispatch availability failed, and kept the specialist conflict attached to the fallback desk.
contextHighlights: CCTV specialist argued for CCTV Review.
Track specialist argued for Tactical Track.
Track fallback still held the next move after dispatch availability failed.

decisionBias.summary: Dispatch was unavailable, so ONYX kept the live-ops sequence moving in Tactical Track.

replayBiasStack.summary: Dispatch was unavailable, so ONYX kept the live-ops sequence moving in Tactical Track.
Specialist conflict (cctv->cctvReview | track->tacticalTrack) still leaned back to CCTV Review while Tactical Track stayed in front.

missingInfo: Conflicting specialist recommendations still need reconciliation before the next move is locked.
Fresh CCTV confirmation has not landed yet.
commandBrainSnapshot.followUpPrompt: Reconcile the conflicting specialist recommendations and confirm whether Tactical Track remains the correct next desk.
